# Tea

In the afternoon I make a pot of warm tea. There is no particular reason for it. It is just that watching the steam drift makes my mind come loose and settle.

I change the water temperature and the steeping time a little each day. The taste shifts every time, so it feels like a small experiment, and I enjoy that. Some days it does not go well, and that is fine too.

I am not doing anything special. Still, a small stretch of time like this makes the afternoon feel softer to me.
